# Sermon Keeper

> AI-powered sermon notes app for iOS. Record sermons, take timestamped notes, get automatic transcription with summary and key points. Built specifically for churchgoers.

## About

Sermon Keeper is an iOS app designed for church-going Christians who want to capture, remember, and reflect on sermons. It combines audio recording, timestamped note-taking, Bible verse autocomplete, and AI-powered transcription in one simple app.

## Key Features

- One-tap sermon recording in high quality audio
- Timestamped notes — each note saves the exact moment in the sermon
- Autocomplete Bible verses — type a reference like John 3:16 and see the full verse
- AI-powered speech-to-text transcription with organized summary and key points
- iCloud sync — recordings and notes stay on your device and sync to your personal iCloud
- Works in English and Spanish
- No account required — download and start recording immediately

## Pricing

- 3 free recordings included
- $6.99/month or $64.99/year for unlimited recordings

## Who It's For

- Busy church-goers who want to remember the sermon but can't take detailed notes during service
- Bible study groups who want to share accurate sermon notes without retyping everything
- New believers who want to catch every Bible reference the pastor mentions

## Links

- Website: https://sermonkeeper.app
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/apple-store/id6758739935?pt=128512327&ct=landing_page&mt=8
- Contact: hello@sermonkeeper.app

## Technical Details

- Platform: iOS (iPhone)
- Bible Version: King James Version (KJV), more translations coming
- Data Storage: On-device + iCloud sync
- Languages: English, Spanish
